serviceDescription.aws: AWS Systems Manager gives you visibility and control of your infrastructure on AWS. Systems Manager provides a unified user interface so you can view operational data from multiple AWS services and allows you to automate operational tasks across your AWS resources.
serviceDescription.aws-cn: Amazon Systems Manager gives you visibility and control of your infrastructure on Amazon. Systems Manager provides a unified user interface so you can view operational data from multiple Amazon services and allows you to automate operational tasks across your Amazon resources.

description.aws: Select AWS Systems Manager features that you want to estimate. Features that are provided at no additional charge are not listed here.
description.aws-cn: Select Amazon Systems Manager features that you want to estimate. Features that are provided at no additional charge are not listed here.

infoDescription.aws: With AWS Systems Manager, you pay only for what you use on the following priced features, as you use them. There are no minimum fees or upfront commitments. Features that are provided at no additional charge are not listed here.
infoDescription.aws-cn: With Amazon Systems Manager, you pay only for what you use on the following priced features, as you use them. There are no minimum fees or upfront commitments. Features that are provided at no additional charge are not listed here.
